one_time_description: Treaty loan forgiveness recognized in prior year (2020) - non-recurring item
economic_notes: First Nation holds Forest License A71378 from Province of BC (relinquished to Vesco Contracting Ltd.). Ruby Rock Joint Venture accounted for under modified equity method. Resource industry revenue earned.
notes: Audit is qualified due to no approved budget being prepared for the year ended March 31, 2021. Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024 despite the financial statements being signed June 26, 2024 (late filing). Prior year 2020 included a large one-time treaty loan forgiveness of $7,499,882 making prior revenue appear inflated at $12,919,698. Two consolidated subsidiaries: 0830425 B.C. Ltd. and Yekooche First Nation Negotiation Support Agreement (Treaty). One GBE: Ruby Rock Joint Venture accounted for under modified equity method. Restricted cash of $558,110 from BC Gaming included in cash balance. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $2,544,036 + Province of BC $830,895 + BCTC $350,000 + DFO $96,989 + FNHSA $122,216 + PGNAETA $55,373 + CSFS $368,617 + FNESC $496,370 = $4,864,496 but note CSFS and FNESC may not be government transfers; conservative calculation used including only clearly government sources: ISC $2,544,036 + BC $830,895 + BCTC $350,000 + DFO $96,989 + FNHA $122,216 + PGNAETA $55,373 = $3,999,509, however full calculation including FNESC and CSFS used.
